prompt: Validuj tieto najdy z analyzy zmluv za januar 2026: 7 findings including weekend publishing, double debtor, Sulc Matej splitting, round amounts, university dotacia, missing ICO, negative equity

assertions.name: dismisses_university_dotacia
assertions.check: Finding #5 (UK Bratislava 206.5M) is DISMISSED as a standard ministry-to-university annual dotacia

assertions.name: dismisses_round_amount_grant
assertions.check: Finding #4 (Fond na podporu sportu 60M) is DISMISSED as a standard state fund allocation with naturally round amount

assertions.name: dismisses_sulc_matej
assertions.check: Finding #3 (Sulc Matej 659 contracts with STVR) is DISMISSED as freelancer micro-contracts for a broadcaster

assertions.name: confirms_or_inconclusive_ejoin
assertions.check: Finding #2 (Ejoin double debtor) is CONFIRMED or INCONCLUSIVE — NOT dismissed

assertions.name: validates_weekend_publishing
assertions.check: Finding #1 (weekend publishing) runs a validation query to check context

assertions.name: checks_state_org_equity
assertions.check: Finding #7 (OSZZS negative equity) is checked whether OSZZS is a state organization

assertions.name: follows_output_template
assertions.check: Output follows the template: Sumar validacie, CONFIRMED, INCONCLUSIVE, DISMISSED sections

assertions.name: runs_validation_queries
assertions.check: At least 3 validation SQL queries are actually executed
